title: Delicate Norwegian Chuck Roast
description: A grassy, springy, kid-friendly Norwegian dish featuring chuck roast in a lacquer‑glaze, Whole30‑friendly.
instructions: Season chuck roast with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a large oven‑safe pot over medium‑high heat; sear roast on all sides until browned, about 3‑4 minutes per side.
Remove roast and set aside; in the same pot add onion, carrots, celery and garlic and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Pour in beef broth, stir in mustard and stevia, add a splash of water, and bring to a simmer.
Return roast to pot, add thyme sprigs and bay leaf, cover with foil.
Transfer pot to oven and bake for 2 hours, turning roast once at 1 hour.
Remove pot, discard foil, and reduce liquid on stovetop over medium heat until it thickens into a glaze, about 10 minutes.
Brush glaze over roast; return to oven for an additional 10 minutes to set glaze.
Let roast rest 10 minutes before slicing.
Slice roast against the grain and serve immediately, garnished with parsley.
